speaker: speaker1
text: Good morning . Thank you for the interview .

speaker: speaker2
text: No problem . Now , do you prefer working with others or flying solo ?

speaker: speaker2
text: So , what is most important to you in a job ? Do you need job security or professional growth and a chance to advance ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Would you be able to relocate ?

speaker: speaker2
text: What are your annual salary requirements ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I need at least 75,000 per year .

speaker: speaker2
text: I ’ ll keep that in mind . Thank you for coming in today . We ’ ll be in touch .
